metadata.description: Functions for time series analysis, temporal operations, and statistical time-based calculations

lead.description: Create lead (future) values for specified columns
lead.output_description: Function that creates lead values in a TimeSeriesPipe

required_params.name: columns
required_params.description: Column(s) to create lead values for

optional_params.name: periods
optional_params.description: Number of periods to lead (default: 1)

optional_params.name: time_column
optional_params.description: Time column to sort by before calculating lead values (optional)

optional_params.name: group_columns
optional_params.description: Columns to group by before calculating lead values (for panel data) (optional)

optional_params.name: suffix
optional_params.description: Suffix to add to the names of lead columns (default: '_lead')

outputs.description: Function that creates lead values in a TimeSeriesPipe

lag.description: Create lag (past) values for specified columns
lag.output_description: Function that creates lag values in a TimeSeriesPipe

required_params.name: columns
required_params.description: Column(s) to create lag values for

optional_params.name: periods
optional_params.description: Number of periods to lag (default: 1)

optional_params.name: time_column
optional_params.description: Time column to sort by before calculating lag values (optional)

optional_params.name: group_columns
optional_params.description: Columns to group by before calculating lag values (for panel data) (optional)

optional_params.name: suffix
optional_params.description: Suffix to add to the names of lag columns (default: '_lag')

outputs.description: Function that creates lag values in a TimeSeriesPipe

variance_analysis.description: Calculate variance and standard deviation for time series data
variance_analysis.output_description: Function that calculates variance in a TimeSeriesPipe

optional_params.name: method
optional_params.description: Method to use: 'rolling', 'expanding', or 'ewm' (exponentially weighted moving) (default: 'rolling')

optional_params.name: window
optional_params.description: Window size for rolling calculations (used for 'rolling' and 'ewm' methods) (default: 5)

optional_params.name: time_column
optional_params.description: Time column to sort by before calculations (optional)

optional_params.name: group_columns
optional_params.description: Columns to group by before calculations (for panel data) (optional)

optional_params.name: suffix
optional_params.description: Suffix to add to column names (defaults to '_var' and '_std') (optional)

outputs.description: Function that calculates variance in a TimeSeriesPipe

distribution_analysis.description: Calculate distribution statistics and histograms for time series data
distribution_analysis.output_description: Function that analyzes distributions in a TimeSeriesPipe

optional_params.name: bins
optional_params.description: Number of bins for histogram calculation (default: 10)

optional_params.name: group_columns
optional_params.description: Columns to group by before analysis (for panel data) (optional)

optional_params.name: normalize
optional_params.description: Whether to normalize histogram counts (return proportions) (default: False)

outputs.description: Function that analyzes distributions in a TimeSeriesPipe

cumulative_distribution.description: Calculate cumulative distribution (empirical CDF) for specified columns
cumulative_distribution.output_description: Function that calculates cumulative distributions in a TimeSeriesPipe

optional_params.name: time_column
optional_params.description: Time column to sort by before calculations (optional)

optional_params.name: group_columns
optional_params.description: Columns to group by before calculations (for panel data) (optional)

optional_params.name: suffix
optional_params.description: Suffix to add to column names (default: '_cdf')

outputs.description: Function that calculates cumulative distributions in a TimeSeriesPipe

rolling_window.description: Apply rolling window operations to time series data
rolling_window.output_description: Function that applies rolling window operations in a TimeSeriesPipe

optional_params.name: window
optional_params.description: Window size for rolling calculations (default: 5)

optional_params.name: unit
optional_params.description: Time unit for window: 'daily', 'weekly', 'monthly', or 'yearly' (default: 'daily')

optional_params.name: aggregation
optional_params.description: Aggregation type: 'mean', 'sum', 'std', or 'count' (default: 'mean')

optional_params.name: time_column
optional_params.description: Time column to sort by before calculations (optional)

optional_params.name: group_columns
optional_params.description: Columns to group by before calculations (for panel data) (optional)

optional_params.name: suffix
optional_params.description: Suffix to add to column names (defaults to '_rolling_{aggregation}') (optional)

outputs.description: Function that applies rolling window operations in a TimeSeriesPipe

get_distribution_summary.description: Return a formatted summary of distribution analysis results
get_distribution_summary.output_description: Function that returns distribution summaries from a TimeSeriesPipe

outputs.description: Function that returns distribution summaries from a TimeSeriesPipe

custom_calculation.description: Apply a custom calculation function to the data
custom_calculation.output_description: Function that applies the custom calculation in a TimeSeriesPipe

required_params.name: func
required_params.description: A function that takes a DataFrame and returns a DataFrame

outputs.description: Function that applies the custom calculation in a TimeSeriesPipe
